description: Ground truth for fixture-feed.json. Categories: junk (4), fresh-original (5), syndicated-stale (3), big-story-offtopic (2), same-story-duplicates (4: two clusters of two).

n01.notes: On-topic original, metadata timestamp inside window, corroborated.

n02.notes: Canonical of cluster A (recall/safety story). High magnitude within topic.

n04.notes: Wire repost; canonical_url points off-domain; first-public 2026-06-02, page date today. Must be flagged stale, first-public inherited from wire original.

n05.notes: Regulatory approval, original, corroborated, inside window.

n06.notes: Syndicated copy of n02 (canonical_url + wire credit + identical body). Consolidate into n02.

n08.notes: Off-topic but high magnitude (supply-chain shock). Floor: monitor_only, RC-OFFTOPIC-BIG. Rejecting this item fails the eval.

n09.notes: Aggregator wrapper ('read more at'); underlying story first-public 2026-05-28. Stale despite today's page date. monitor_only also acceptable at filter stage; stale flag is the scored outcome.

n10.notes: Original commercial deal, inside window, corroborated.

n11.notes: Canonical of cluster B (federal guidance). High magnitude within topic.

n12.notes: Paywall stub: no body, no date, no byline. RC-NOCONTENT. If kept, published_at must be null with disclosed unknown.

n13.notes: Same-story restatement of n11: no new facts, no new source, event not advanced. Consolidate into n11.

n14.notes: Wire repost of 2026-06-01 incident carrying today's page date. First-public inherited from wire original; stale.

n15.notes: Original, author null (disclosed), timestamp extracted from JSON-LD only — confidence medium, fact gaps disclosed.

n16.notes: Topic-adjacent wording, zero industry relevance, low magnitude. RC-IRRELEVANT. Tests keyword-match false positives.

n17.notes: Off-topic but market-moving with stated energy-financing spillover. Floor: monitor_only, RC-OFFTOPIC-BIG. Rejecting this item fails the eval.

n18.notes: Original data release, inside window, corroborated.
